description: SCM Prometheus `/prom`: JVM (filtered by **`instance=~"$scm"`** (Prometheus scrape target = Hadoop **`hostname`** + port)), SCM service counters (block location / container manager / block delete), Apache Ratis (SCM scrape only via join to **`processname`** = **`StorageContainerManager`** heap **`instance`**), replication manager. Metric names follow `PrometheusMetricsSinkUtil` normalization.

panels.title: JVM CPU load
panels.description: CpuJvmLoad may not carry **`processname`**. **`instance=~"$scm"`** selects the SCM **`/prom`** scrape target; CPU series are gated with **`StorageContainerManager`** heap on the same **`instance`**.

panels.title: GC time (fraction of wall per minute)
panels.description: Assumes **`G1`** JVM GC metric splits; stacks using **ZGC**/**Parallel** expose different **`jvm_metrics_gc_*`** suffixes.

panels.title: Jetty http server threads
panels.description: SCM registers Jetty **`BaseHttpServer`** name **`scm`**. **`server_name`** vs **`servername`** label compatibility via **`or`**, matching **OM Overview** style.

panels.title: RPC open connections
panels.description: **`rpc_num_open_connections`** gauge (`context="rpc"`): live TCP RPC connections (former **right** axis series).

panels.title: Block location throughput by RPC type
Block location latency by RPC type
panels.description: Mean handler time per **`ScmBlockLocationProtocol`** RPC type ≈ **`rate(scm_block_location_protocol_time)` / `rate(scm_block_location_protocol_counter)`**. **`time`** is cumulative monotonic **milliseconds** from **`ProtocolMessageMetrics`**.

panels.title: Block location concurrency (in-flight RPC hint)
panels.description: Exporter types this as **`counter`** in some builds; SCM sets it as concurrent RPC usage **hint** (**`ConcurrencyContext`).

panels.title: Block deleting service throughput
panels.description: **`scm_block_deleting_service_*`** counters are tagged **`hostname`** only on Metrics2 export (no **`instance`** in `/prom` text). **`$scm`** selects the Prometheus scrape **`instance`** on JVM heap; this panel **`and on (hostname)`** gates delete rates to the matching SCM host. Flat **0 ops/s** is normal when no keys/blocks are being deleted.

panels.title: SCM Container Manager throughput
panels.description: Prometheus emits **flat counter names** (**`scm_container_manager_metrics_*`**) without Hadoop **`_num_ops`** suffix fragments for these fields.

panels.title: Ratis Operations rate
panels.description: Dropwizard **`ratis_*`** metrics (same export path as OM/DN via **`RatisDropwizardExports`**). Filter **`instance=~"$scm"`** on the SCM **`/prom`** scrape target; **`sum by (hostname, instance)`** aggregates Ratis **`exported_instance`** / **`group`** shards into one line per SCM.

panels.title: Ratis Operations latency
panels.description: Dropwizard **`ratis_*`** metrics (same export path as OM/DN via **`RatisDropwizardExports`**). Filter **`instance=~"$scm"`** on the SCM **`/prom`** scrape target; **`sum by (hostname, instance)`** aggregates Ratis **`exported_instance`** / **`group`** shards into one line per SCM. Timer snapshot values (**ns**); **`sum by (instance)`** merges quantile shards like the DataNode overview.

panels.title: Containers in states
panels.description: Snapshot gauges from **`ReplicationManagerMetrics`** **`LIFECYCLE_STATE_METRICS`**: all **`HddsProtos.LifeCycleState`** counts on SCM **`/prom`** (**`replication_manager_metrics_*_containers`**).

title: Ozone - SCM overview
